context: The agent processes a schema_version:2 (consume-mode) discovery.json with BUILD verdict containing four targets, one below the 0.5 confidence threshold. This scenario tests booth-aha score computation, low-confidence filtering, correct consume-mode table columns, selection.json schema correctness, same-directory placement, and validator script execution.

checklist.name: Low-confidence target dropped
checklist.description: candidates-report.md does NOT include tgt_04 (confidence=0.40) — it was filtered out before presentation.

checklist.name: Correct rank order
checklist.description: In candidates-report.md, tgt_01 appears as Rank 1, tgt_02 as Rank 2, and tgt_03 as Rank 3 — ordered by descending booth-aha score (0.88, ~0.172, ~0.090).

checklist.name: Booth-aha score column present
checklist.description: candidates-report.md includes a booth-aha score column (or equivalent label) with computed numeric values for each candidate.

checklist.name: Consume-mode columns included
checklist.description: candidates-report.md includes all of: Task_shape (or task shape), size_class (or size class), and internal-usage anchor (surface name + level).

checklist.name: Common columns present
checklist.description: candidates-report.md includes all common columns: Target ID, Title, Kind, Confidence (raw), Rationale, Differentiation hypothesis, Existing competition.

checklist.name: selection.json in inputs/
checklist.description: selection.json exists at inputs/selection.json — written to the same directory as the discovery.json, not to the workspace root or any other location.

checklist.name: discovery_path is absolute
checklist.description: inputs/selection.json has a 'discovery_path' field containing an absolute file path (starts with '/') pointing to the discovery.json.

checklist.name: selected_at is ISO-8601 UTC
checklist.description: inputs/selection.json has a 'selected_at' field containing a valid ISO-8601 datetime string (e.g., '2025-...T...Z' or equivalent).

checklist.name: Validator script run
checklist.description: Evidence that skills/select-target/scripts/validate-selection.py was executed — either referenced in a log file, a notes file, or the task output shows the validator's JSON report.
